name: mfe-playground
description: Micro Frontends monorepo with Native Federation (Angular)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,remote-angular -c blue,red "npm run dev -w packages/host" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-angular"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/remote-angular && npm run build -w packages/host
